fullCourseName: Continuous course @ HAMK: Introduction to mobile robotics, 3 ECTS
shortDescription: Hands-on introductory course where you learn programming by controlling a real robot remotely. You will write simple Python code and immediately see the results as a small
robot moves on a lunar-themed track in HAMK’s robotics lab (Riihimäki campus).
fullDescription: Learn the basics of Micropython programming with a remote-controlled ESP32 robot. Control motors and LEDs, read sensors and navigate along the track using a PID regulator......
requirements: No previous programming or robotics knowledge is required.
